enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that a bank's existing Information Technology (IT) outsourcing
agreements regardless of whether they are due for renewal on or after the
effective date of these Directions shall comply with the provisions of these
Directions either at the time of renewal or by April 10, 2026, whichever is earlier.
enriched_requirements.object: of these Directions either at the time of renewal or by April 10, 2026, whichever is earlier

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, the bank's new IT outsourcing agreements that come into force on or
after the effective date of these Directions, shall comply with the provisions of
these Directions from the date of agreement itself.
enriched_requirements.object: of these Directions from the date of agreement itself

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that nothing in the preceding proviso shall be construed as
permitting non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory
requirements applicable to such arrangements.
enriched_requirements.object: non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory requirements applicable to such arrangements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Small Finance Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
enriched_requirements.object: Finance Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The scope of provisions contained in Chapter, III shall be as under:
(1) The provisions shall apply to outsourcing arrangements entered into by a bank
with a service provider which may be either a member of the group /
conglomerate to which the bank belongs, or an unrelated party, which is
located in India or elsewhere, for outsourcing of financial services like
applications processing (loan origination, credit card), document processing,
<image>
marketing and research, supervision of loans, data processing and back office
related activities.
enriched_requirements.object: The provisions shall apply to outsourcing arrangements entered into by a bank with a service provider which may be either a member of

conditions: Provided that for outsourced services relating to credit cards
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that for outsourced services relating to credit cards, the provisions
set out in the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Credit Cards and
Debit Cards: Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025, as amended from time
to time, shall also apply to the applicable entities.
enriched_requirements.object: applicable entities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (2) The provisions shall also apply, mutatis mutandis, to subcontracted activities.
enriched_requirements.object: to subcontracted activities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, the outsourcing contract shall provide for prior approval or
consent of the bank before a service provider engages any subcontractor for
all or part of the outsourced activity.
enriched_requirements.object: or consent of the bank before a service provider engages any subcontractor for all or part of the outsourced activity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Before granting such consent, the bank
shall review the subcontracting arrangement and ensure that the same
complies with the Directions set out in Chapter III of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: and ensure that the same complies with the Directions set out in Chapter III of these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (3) The provisions shall not apply to outsourcing of:

(iii) audit-related assignments to Chartered Accountant firms which shall
continue to be governed by the instructions and guidelines issued by the
Department of Supervision, RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: by the instructions and guidelines issued by the Department of Supervision, RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The scope of provisions contained in Chapter IV shall be as under:
(1) The provisions shall apply to a bank's material outsourcing of IT services, as
defined in paragraph 53(2).
enriched_requirements.object: The provisions shall apply to a bank's material outsourcing of IT services, as defined in paragraph 53(2)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In this context, 'Outsourcing of IT Services' shall
include outsourcing of the following services:
enriched_requirements.object: following services:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (2) The provisions shall not apply to the following services:
enriched_requirements.object: services:

conditions: Provided that for the purpose of these Directions
enriched_requirements.object: - Commercial Banks

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of these Directions, 'Commercial Banks' means banking
companies (other than Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, Payments
Banks and Regional Rural Banks), corresponding new banks, and the State
Bank of India as defined respectively under clauses (c), (da), and (nc) of
section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
enriched_requirements.object: Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, Payments Banks and Regional Rural Banks), corresponding new banks, and the State

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
'Continuing basis' shall include agreements for a
<image>
limited period.
enriched_requirements.object: <image> limited period
the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time, for t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the Reserve
Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Information Technology Act, 2000, or the Companies
Act, 2013, and Rules made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-
enactment thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by RBI or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Information

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank intending to outsource any of its financial or IT activities shall put in place
corresponding comprehensive Board-approved outsourcing policy, the coverage of
which is indicated in paragraph 20 and paragraph 57, respectively.
enriched_requirements.object: comprehensive Board-approved outsourcing policy, the coverage of which is indicated in paragraph 20 and paragraph 57, respe

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board or a Committee of the Board to which powers have been delegated, as
applicable for financial or IT outsourcing, shall be responsible for putting in place a
framework to evaluate the risks and materiality of all existing and prospective
outsourcing arrangements, laying down appropriate approval authorities
depending on risks and materiality, and undertaking regular review.
enriched_requirements.object: in place a framework to evaluate the risks and materiality of all existing and prospective outsourcing arrangements, laying

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of outsourcing of financial services,
(1) the Board, or a Committee of the Board to which powers have been
delegated, shall be responsible, inter alia, for:
enriched_requirements.object: for:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (2) the Audit Committee of the Board (ACB) of a bank shall:

In respect of outsourcing of IT services, the Board shall be responsible, inter alia,
for:
enriched_requirements.object: for:

conditions:
when permitting an
exception to the requirement that the service provider of outsourced services
if not a group company
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) ensuring either by itself or through its Committee that there is no conflict of
interest arising out of third-party engagements, especially when permitting an
exception to the requirement that the service provider of outsourced services,
if not a group company, shall not be owned or controlled by any director, key
managerial personnel, approver of the outsourcing arrangement, or their
relatives as indicated under the proviso to paragraph 54 of these Directions;
enriched_requirements.object: by any director, key managerial personnel, approver of the outsourcing arrangement, or their relatives as indicated under the p

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
'Materiality' of
outsourcing shall be based on the:

enriched_requirements.object: to perform the service

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Activities that shall not be outsourced

A bank which chooses to outsource financial services shall however not outsource
core management functions including Internal Audit, compliance function, and
decision-making functions like determining compliance with KYC norms for
opening deposit accounts, giving sanction for loans (including retail loans), and
management of investment portfolio.
enriched_requirements.object: management functions including Internal Audit, compliance function, and decision-making functions like determining complian

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank which desires to outsource financial services, shall not require prior
approval from RBI whether the service provider is located in or outside India.
enriched_requirements.object: RBI whether the service provider is located in or outside India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As stated in paragraph 9, the outsourcing of any activity by a bank shall not
diminish its obligations including to its customers and RBI, and those of its Board
and Senior Management, who have the ultimate responsibility for the outsourced
<image>
activity.
enriched_requirements.object: to its customers and RBI, and those of its Board and Senior Management, who have the ultimate responsibility for th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall, therefore, be responsible for the actions of its service
provider including Direct Sales Agents (DSAs) / Direct Marketing Agents (DMAs)
and recovery agents, and the confidentiality of information pertaining to the
customers that is available with the service provider.
enriched_requirements.object: for the actions of its service provider including Direct Sales Agents (DSAs) / Direct Marketing Agents (DMAs) and recovery

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall retain ultimate
control of the outsourced activity.
enriched_requirements.object: the outsourced activity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) the service provider shall not be owned or controlled by any director or officer
/ employee of the bank or their relatives having the same meaning as
assigned under Companies Act, 2013 and the Rules framed thereunder, as
amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: by any director or officer / employee of the bank or their relatives having the same meaning as assigned under Companies Act, 2

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall be responsible for making Currency Transactions Reports (CTRs)
and Suspicious Transactions Reports (STRs) to FIU or any other competent
authority in respect of its customer related activities carried out by the service
providers.
enriched_requirements.object: Currency Transactions Reports (CTRs) and Suspicious Transactions Reports (STRs) to FIU or any other competent authority in r

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank intending to outsource any of its financial services shall put in place a
comprehensive outsourcing policy, approved by its Board, which shall incorporate,
inter alia, the following:
enriched_requirements.object: comprehensive outsourcing policy, approved by its Board, which shall incorporate, inter alia, the following:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The Senior Management of a bank shall, inter alia, be responsible for:
enriched_requirements.object: responsible for:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall evaluate and guard against the following key risks when entering into
outsourcing arrangements:
enriched_requirements.object: the following key risks when entering into outsourcing arrangements:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) Operational Risk - which may arise due to technology failure, fraud, error,
or inadequate financial capacity of the service provider to fulfil obligations or
to provide remedies.
enriched_requirements.object: failure, fraud, error, or inadequate financial capacity of the service provider to fulfil obligations or to provide remedies

conditions:
when a bank becomes over reliant on one
service provider
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) Exit Strategy Risk - may arise when a bank becomes over reliant on one
service provider, loses relevant internal skills preventing it from bringing the
activity back in-house, or enters into contracts that make speedy exits
prohibitively expensive.
enriched_requirements.object: becomes over reliant on one service provider, loses relevant internal skills preventing it from bringing the activity back in-house,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ix) Contractual Risk - where the bank may not have the ability to enforce the
contract with the service provider.
enriched_requirements.object: enforce the contract with the service provider

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall seek to ensure the security, preservation, and protection of the
customer information in the custody or possession of the service provider.
enriched_requirements.object: security, preservation, and protection of the customer information in the custody or possession of the service provider

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Access to customer information by a service provider or its staff shall be on a
'need to know' basis, i.e., limited to those areas where the information is required
in order to perform the outsourced function.
enriched_requirements.object: to know' basis, i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall review and monitor the security practices and control processes of its
service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclose
security breaches.
enriched_requirements.object: security practices and control processes of its service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclo

conditions:
where a service provider acts as an outsourcing agent for multiple
entities
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In instances, where a service provider acts as an outsourcing agent for multiple
entities, the bank shall take care to build strong safeguards so that there is no
comingling or combining of information, documents, records, and assets.
enriched_requirements.object: strong safeguards so that there is no comingling or combining of information, documents, records, and assets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that a service provider is able to isolate and clearly identify the
bank's customer information, documents, records, and assets to protect the
confidentiality of the information.
enriched_requirements.object: provider is able to isolate and clearly identify the bank's customer information, documents, records, and assets to protect the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall immediately notify RBI in the event of breach of security and leakage
of confidential customer related information.
enriched_requirements.object: the event of breach of security and leakage of confidential customer related information

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these eventualities, the bank shall
be liable to its customers for any damage.
enriched_requirements.object: customers for any damage

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an
outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to
comply with obligations in the outsourcing agreement on an ongoing basis.
enriched_requirements.object: while considering or renewing an outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to comply

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The due diligence mentioned above shall involve an evaluation of all available
information, as applicable, about the service provider, including but not limited to:
<image>
enriched_requirements.object: all available information, as applicable, about the service provider, including but not limited to: <image>

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(viii) external factors like political, economic, social, and legal environment of the
jurisdiction in which the service provider operates and other events that may
impact data security and service performance.
enriched_requirements.object: service performance

conditions: Where possible
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where possible, a bank shall obtain independent reviews and market feedback on
the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence.
enriched_requirements.object: market feedback on the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall also evaluate whether the systems of its service provider are
compatible with those of the bank, and the acceptability of their standards of
performance including in the area of customer service.
enriched_requirements.object: systems of its service provider are compatible with those of the bank, and the acceptability of their standards of performan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that the terms and conditions governing the outsourcing
arrangement are carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by the bank's
legal counsel on their legal effect and enforceability.
enriched_requirements.object: and conditions governing the outsourcing arrangement are carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by the bank's legal

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The agreement shall
appropriately reckon the associated risks and the strategies for mitigating or
managing them.
enriched_requirements.object: risks and the strategies for mitigating or managing them

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall ensure that such an agreement is sufficiently
flexible to allow it to retain an appropriate level of control over the outsourcing, and
<image>
the right to intervene with appropriate measures to meet legal and regulatory
obligations.
enriched_requirements.object: agreement is sufficiently flexible to allow it to retain an appropriate level of control over the outsourcing, and <image> the rig

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The agreement shall also bring out the nature of legal relationship
between the parties, i.e., whether agent-principal or otherwise.
enriched_requirements.object: nature of legal relationship between the parties, i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Some of the key provisions of the agreement shall include:

(xi) provision that confidentiality of customers' information shall be maintained
even after the contract expires or gets terminated;
enriched_requirements.object: the contract expires or gets terminated

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have in place a management structure to monitor and control its
outsourced activities and shall ensure that outsourcing agreements with its
service provider contain provisions to address the same.
enriched_requirements.object: management structure to monitor and control its outsourced activities and shall ensure that outsourcing agreements with its service pr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall maintain a central record of all material outsourcing of financial
services for review by its Board and Senior Management.
enriched_requirements.object: of all material outsourcing of financial services for review by its Board and Senior Management

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The records shall be
updated promptly, and half-yearly reviews shall be placed before the Board.
enriched_requirements.object: half-yearly reviews shall be placed before the Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Regular audits, by either the internal auditors or external auditors of a bank, shall
assess the adequacy of the risk management practices adopted in overseeing and
managing the outsourcing arrangement, the bank's compliance with its risk
management framework, and the requirements of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: the risk management practices adopted in overseeing and managing the outsourcing arrangement, the bank's compliance with its ri

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall, at least on an annual basis, review the financial and operational
condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its
outsourcing obligations.
enriched_requirements.object: an annual basis, review the financial and operational condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its ou

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such due diligence reviews, which shall be based on all
available information about the service provider, shall highlight any deterioration or
breach in performance standards, confidentiality, and security, and in operational
resilience or business continuity preparedness.
enriched_requirements.object: available information about the service provider, shall highlight any deterioration or breach in performance standards, confidentialit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the bank shall ensure that reconciliation of
transactions between itself and the service provider (or its subcontractors) is
carried out in a timely manner.
enriched_requirements.object: transactions between itself and the service provider (or its subcontractors) is carried out in a timely manner

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that the reconciliation is carried
out as advised in RBI guidelines on 'Outsourcing of Cash Management -
<image>
Reconciliation of Transactions' dated May 14, 2019, as amended from time to
time.
enriched_requirements.object: is carried out as advised in RBI guidelines on 'Outsourcing of Cash Management - <image> Reconciliation of Transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall require its service provider to develop and establish a robust
framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity and
recovery procedures.
enriched_requirements.object: to develop and establish a robust framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity and recovery pr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall ensure that the service provider
periodically tests the Business Continuity and Recovery Plan, and may also
consider occasional joint testing and recovery exercises with its service provider.
enriched_requirements.object: provider periodically tests the Business Continuity and Recovery Plan, and may also consider occasional joint testing and reco

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In establishing a viable contingency plan, a bank shall consider the availability of
alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced activity
back in-house in an emergency, and the costs, time, and resources that would be
involved.
enriched_requirements.object: alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced activity back in-house in an emergency, and t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the bank's
information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse
conditions or termination of the agreement, all documents, records of transactions
and information with the service provider, and assets of the bank, can be removed
from the possession of the service provider (in order to continue its business
operations), or deleted, destroyed, or rendered unusable.
enriched_requirements.object: providers are able to isolate the bank's information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse conditions o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In order to mitigate the risk of unexpected termination of the outsourcing
agreement, or insolvency or liquidation of its service provider, a bank shall retain
an appropriate level of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the
right to intervene with appropriate measures to continue its business operations
without incurring prohibitive expenses and disruption in the operations of the bank
and its services to the customers.
enriched_requirements.object: of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the right to intervene with appropriate measures to continue its bu

conditions: If the services of a service provider are terminated by a bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: If the services of a service provider are terminated by a bank, then it shall:

(1) In a group structure, a bank may have back-office and service arrangements or
agreements with group entities such as sharing of premises, legal and other
professional services, hardware and software applications and centralized back-
office functions;
enriched_requirements.object: arrangements or agreements with group entities such as sharing of premises, legal and other professional services, hardwa

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In
principle, the risk management practices to be adopted by a bank while
outsourcing to a related party (i.e., party within the group / conglomerate) shall be
identical to those for a non-related party.
enriched_requirements.object: for a non-related party

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (2) While entering into such arrangements, a bank shall ensure that these:

<image>
(3) A bank shall ensure that its ability to carry out its operations in a sound fashion
would not be affected, if premises or other services (such as IT systems and
support staff) provided by the group entities become unavailable.
enriched_requirements.object: to carry out its operations in a sound fashion would not be affected

conditions:
If the premises of a bank are shared with the group entities for the purpose of
cross-selling
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) If the premises of a bank are shared with the group entities for the purpose of
cross-selling, the bank shall take measures to ensure that the entity's
identification is distinctly visible and clear to the customers.
enriched_requirements.object: that the entity's identification is distinctly visible and clear to the customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The marketing
brochure used by the group entity and verbal communication by its staff / agent
in the bank's premises shall mention nature of arrangement of the entity with the
bank so that the customers are clear on the seller of the product.
enriched_requirements.object: of the entity with the bank so that the customers are clear on the seller of the product

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) A bank shall not publish any advertisement or enter into any agreement stating
or suggesting or giving tacit impression that it is in any way responsible for the
obligations of its group entities.
enriched_requirements.object: enter into any agreement stating or suggesting or giving tacit impression that it is in any way responsible for the oblig

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In principle, outsourcing arrangements shall only be entered into with parties
operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality agreements and clauses.
enriched_requirements.object: with parties operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality agreements and clauses

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: While engaging with service provider(s) in a foreign country, a bank shall:

conditions: in case there are differences
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The overseas operations of a bank shall be governed by both, these Directions
and the host country guidelines, and in case there are differences, the more
stringent of the two shall prevail.
enriched_requirements.object: these Directions and the host country guidelines, and in case there are differences, the more stringent of the two shall prevail

conditions: where there is any conflict
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, where there is any conflict, the host
country guidelines shall prevail.

Outsourcing arrangements entered into by a bank shall not affect the rights of its
customers against the bank, including the ability of the customers to obtain
redressal as applicable under relevant laws.
enriched_requirements.object: its customers against the bank, including the ability of the customers to obtain redressal as applicable under relevant laws

conditions:
where customers are required to deal with a service provider in the
process of dealing with a bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where customers are required to deal with a service provider in the
process of dealing with a bank, the bank shall incorporate a clause in the
corresponding product literature, and brochures, stating that services of the
service provider, including in sales and marketing of the products, may be used.
enriched_requirements.object: the corresponding product literature, and brochures, stating that services of the service provider, including in sales and mar

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The role of the service provider may be indicated in broad terms.
enriched_requirements.object: terms

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have a robust grievance redressal mechanism that shall not be
compromised in any manner on account of outsourcing, i.e., responsibility for
redressal of customers' grievances related to outsourced services shall rest with
the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: manner on account of outsourcing, i

conditions: In case of microfinance loans
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of microfinance loans, a declaration that, (i) the bank shall be
accountable for inappropriate behaviour of the employees of the service provider
<image>
and (ii) shall provide timely grievance redressal, shall be made in the loan
agreement, and in Fair Practices Code (FPC) displayed in its office, branch
premises, and its website.
enriched_requirements.object: behaviour of the employees of the service provider <image> and (ii) shall provide timely grievance redressal, shall b

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the above,
(1) a bank shall constitute Grievance Redressal Machinery in accordance with
the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Responsible
Business Conduct) Directions, 2025, and give wide publicity about it within
the bank through electronic and print media;
enriched_requirements.object: in accordance with the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Responsible Business Conduc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) the name and contact number of designated grievance redressal officer of the
bank shall be made known and widely publicised.
enriched_requirements.object: widely publicised

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The designated officer shall
ensure that genuine grievances of customers are redressed promptly without
involving delay.
enriched_requirements.object: of customers are redressed promptly without involving delay
bank's Grievance Redressal Machinery will also deal with the issue relating to services provided by the service provider

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(3) the time frame fixed for responding to the complaints (maximum 30 days)
shall be placed on the bank's website.
enriched_requirements.object: bank's website

conditions:
If a complaint is rejected wholly or
partly by a bank
enriched_requirements.timeline: within 30 days after the bank received the complaint
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If a complaint is rejected wholly or
partly by a bank, and the complainant is not satisfied with the reply, or does
not get any reply within 30 days after the bank received the complaint, the
complainant shall have the option to seek grievance redressal under the
RBI's Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021.
enriched_requirements.object: seek grievance redressal under the RBI's Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In this Chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'IT services' means IT services / IT enabled services /IT activities.
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'IT services' means IT services / IT enabled services /IT activities

conditions:
if disrupted or compromised shall have the potential to significantly impact
the bank's business operations
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) if disrupted or compromised shall have the potential to significantly impact
the bank's business operations;
enriched_requirements.object: significantly impact the bank's business operations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) may have material impact on the bank's customers in the event of any
unauthorised access, loss, or theft of customer information;
enriched_requirements.object: the bank's customers in the event of any unauthorised access, loss, or theft of customer information

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'Service Provider' means provider of IT services including entities related to
the bank, or those which belong to the same group or conglomerate to which
the bank belongs.
enriched_requirements.object: including entities related to the bank, or those which belong to the same group or conglomerate to which the bank belongs

conditions: Provided that for the purpose of this Chapter
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that for the purpose of this Chapter, the following indicative (but not
exhaustive) list of vendors and entities shall not be considered as 'Service
Providers' as defined above:
enriched_requirements.object: Providers' as defined above:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to adhering to the requirements stipulated in subparagraphs (i) to (v) of
paragraph 18 of these Directions, a bank shall ensure that the service provider, if
not a group company, shall not be owned or controlled by any director, or key
managerial personnel, or approver of the outsourcing arrangement of the bank, or
their relatives.
enriched_requirements.object: by any director, or key managerial personnel, or approver of the outsourcing arrangement of the bank, or their relatives

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms 'control', 'director', 'key managerial personnel', and
'relative' shall have the same meaning as assigned under the Companies Act,
2013 and the Rules framed thereunder from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned under the Companies Act, 2013 and the Rules framed thereunder from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that an exception to the above requirement may be made with the
approval of Board or a Committee of the Board, followed by appropriate
disclosure, oversight and monitoring of such arrangements.
enriched_requirements.object: above requirement may be made with the approval of Board or a Committee of the Board, followed by appropriate disclosure, oversigh

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall evaluate the need for outsourcing of IT services based on a
comprehensive assessment of attendant benefits, risks, and availability of
commensurate processes to manage those risks.
enriched_requirements.object: outsourcing of IT services based on a comprehensive assessment of attendant benefits, risks, and availability of commensurate pr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, the bank shall,
inter alia, consider the following:
enriched_requirements.object: the following:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that cyber incidents are reported to it by the service provider
without undue delay, so that an incident is reported by the bank to the RBI within
six hours of detection by the service provider.
enriched_requirements.object: are reported to it by the service provider without undue delay, so that an incident is reported by the bank to the RBI wit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank intending to outsource any of its IT services shall put in place a
comprehensive Board-approved IT outsourcing policy incorporating, inter alia, the
following:
enriched_requirements.object: comprehensive Board-approved IT outsourcing policy incorporating, inter alia, the following:
(1) assisting the Senior Management in identifying, measuring, monitoring, mitigating, and managing the level of IT outsourcing

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall put in place a risk management framework that comprehensively
deals with the processes and responsibilities for identification, measurement,
mitigation, management, and reporting of risks associated with such IT
outsourcing arrangements.
enriched_requirements.object: risk management framework that comprehensively deals with the processes and responsibilities for identification, measurement, mitigatio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall suitably document risk assessments with necessary approvals in line
with the roles and responsibilities of the Board of Directors, Senior Management,
and IT Function, and subject the same to internal and external quality assurance
on a periodic basis as determined by the Board-approved policy.
enriched_requirements.object: with necessary approvals in line with the roles and responsibilities of the Board of Directors, Senior Management,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall effectively assess the impact of concentration risk posed by multiple
outsourcing arrangements to the same service provider and the concentration risk
posed by outsourcing critical or material functions to a limited number of service
providers.
enriched_requirements.object: of concentration risk posed by multiple outsourcing arrangements to the same service provider and the concentration risk

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall be responsible for the confidentiality, and integrity of data and
information pertaining to its customers that are available to the service provider.
enriched_requirements.object: confidentiality, and integrity of data and information pertaining to its customers that are available to the service provider

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In this regard, a bank shall adhere to directions stated in paragraph 23 to
paragraph 26 of these Directions and additionally ensure that:
<image>
(1) access by service providers to data at the bank, or its data centre shall be on
'need to know' basis, with appropriate controls to prevent security breaches or
data misuse;
enriched_requirements.object: in paragraph 23 to paragraph 26 of these Directions and additionally ensure that: <image> (1) access by service providers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these eventualities, the bank shall
adhere to the extant instructions issued by RBI from time to time on Incident
Response and Recovery Management.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions issued by RBI from time to time on Incident Response and Recovery Management

conditions:
if there is clear separation and isolation
of data (bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
With regard to requirement that the data should not be combined or comingled, as
stipulated in paragraph 26, it would suffice if there is clear separation and isolation
of data (bank, and its customer specific data and information) to ensure that only
the personnel as authorised by the bank is able to access data that belongs to
them in a multi-tenant environment / architecture.
enriched_requirements.object: as stipulated in paragraph 26, it would suffice if there is clear separation and isolation of data (bank, and its customer s

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The directions regarding service provider evaluation as applicable to outsourcing
of financial services contained in paragraph 29 to paragraph 31 shall apply,
mutatis mutandis, to outsourcing of IT services, with the following additional
considerations:
enriched_requirements.object: outsourcing of IT services, with the following additional considerations:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank should adopt a risk-based approach in conducting such due diligence
activities.
enriched_requirements.object: in conducting such due diligence activities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that its rights and obligations and those of each service
provider are clearly defined and set out in a legally binding written agreement, in
line with the provisions specified in paragraph 33 of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: and obligations and those of each service provider are clearly defined and set out in a legally binding written agreement, in l

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In principle,
the provisions of the agreement shall appropriately reckon the criticality of the
outsourced task to the business of the bank, the associated risks, and the
strategies for mitigating or managing them.
enriched_requirements.object: of the outsourced task to the business of the bank, the associated risks, and the strategies for mitigating or ma

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the requirements specified in subparagraphs (i) to (vii) of paragraph
34, a bank shall also include at minimum (as applicable to the scope of Directions
in this Chapter) the following aspects in any agreement for outsourcing of IT
services:
enriched_requirements.object: (as applicable to the scope of Directions in this Chapter) the following aspects in any agreement for outsourcing of IT servic

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have in place a management structure to monitor and control its
outsourced services.
enriched_requirements.object: management structure to monitor and control its outsourced services

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This shall include (as applicable to the scope of Directions in
this Chapter), but not be limited to, monitoring the performance, uptime of the
systems and resources, service availability, adherence to SLA requirements, and
incident response mechanism.
enriched_requirements.object: the scope of Directions in this Chapter), but not be limited to, monitoring the performance, uptime of the systems and resou

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall conduct regular audits (as applicable to the scope of Directions in this
Chapter), of service providers (including subcontractors) with regard to the service
<image>
outsourced by it.
enriched_requirements.object: applicable to the scope of Directions in this Chapter), of service providers (including subcontractors) with regard to the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such audits may be conducted either by bank's internal or
external auditors appointed to act on bank's behalf.
enriched_requirements.object: bank's internal or external auditors appointed to act on bank's behalf

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While outsourcing various IT services, more than one RE may be availing services
from the same third-party service provider.
enriched_requirements.object: the same third-party service provider

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such scenarios, in lieu of conducting
separate audits by individual REs of the common service provider, they may adopt
pooled (shared) audit.

However, in doing so, it shall be the responsibility of REs in
ensuring that the audit requirements related to their respective contract with the
service provider are met effectively.
enriched_requirements.object: REs in ensuring that the audit requirements related to their respective contract with the service provider are met effectivel

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The audits shall assess, inter alia, the performance of the service provider,
adequacy of the risk management practices adopted by the service provider, and
compliance with laws and regulations.
enriched_requirements.object: performance of the service provider, adequacy of the risk management practices adopted by the service provider, and compliance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The frequency of the audit shall be
determined based on the nature and extent of risk, and impact on the bank from
the outsourcing arrangements.
enriched_requirements.object: the nature and extent of risk, and impact on the bank from the outsourcing arrangements

conditions:
in case of any
adverse development
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Reports on the monitoring and control activities
shall be reviewed periodically by the Senior Management, and in case of any
adverse development, the same shall be put up to the Board for information.
enriched_requirements.object: the Senior Management, and in case of any adverse development, the same shall be put up to the Board for information

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank, depending upon the risk assessment, may also rely upon globally
recognised third-party certifications made available by the service provider in lieu
of conducting independent audits.
enriched_requirements.object: recognised third-party certifications made available by the service provider in lieu of conducting independent audits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, this shall not absolve the bank of its
responsibility in ensuring assurance on the controls and procedures required to
safeguard data security (including availability of systems) at the service provider's
end.
enriched_requirements.object: its responsibility in ensuring assurance on the controls and procedures required to safeguard data security (including availabilit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall periodically review the financial and operational condition of the
service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its obligations.
enriched_requirements.object: and operational condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its obligations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank
shall adopt risk-based approach in defining the periodicity.
enriched_requirements.object: defining the periodicity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such due diligence
reviews shall highlight any deterioration or breach in performance standards,
confidentiality, security, and operational resilience preparedness.
enriched_requirements.object: breach in performance standards, confidentiality, security, and operational resilience preparedness

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that the service provider grants unrestricted and effective
access to (a) data related to the outsourced services;
enriched_requirements.object: provider grants unrestricted and effective access to (a) data related to the outsourced services

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall create an inventory of IT services outsourced to service providers
(including key entities involved in their supply chains).
enriched_requirements.object: IT services outsourced to service providers (including key entities involved in their supply chains)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the bank shall map
its dependency on third parties and periodically evaluate the information received
from the service providers.
enriched_requirements.object: third parties and periodically evaluate the information received from the service providers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions regarding 'Business Continuity and Management of Disaster
Recovery Plan' as applicable to outsourcing of financial services contained in
paragraph 40 to paragraph 43 shall apply, mutatis mutandis, to outsourcing of IT
services.
enriched_requirements.object: outsourcing of IT services

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Business Continuity Plan (BCP) and Disaster Recovery Plan (DRP)
for outsourced IT services shall be commensurate with the nature and scope of the
outsourced service as per extant instructions issued by RBI from time to time on
BCP / DR requirements.
enriched_requirements.object: nature and scope of the outsourced service as per extant instructions issued by RBI from time to time on BCP / DR requirement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The IT outsourcing policy shall contain a clear exit strategy for ensuring business
continuity during and after exit.
enriched_requirements.object: strategy for ensuring business continuity during and after exit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The strategy shall include plans for different scenarios of exit or termination of
services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary.
enriched_requirements.object: scenarios of exit or termination of services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In documenting its exit strategy, a bank shall, inter alia, identify alternative
arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service
provider, or by the bank itself.
enriched_requirements.object: alternative arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service provider, or by the bank itself

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that outsourcing agreements have necessary clauses on safe
removal or destruction of data, hardware and all records (digital and physical), as
applicable.
enriched_requirements.object: have necessary clauses on safe removal or destruction of data, hardware and all records (digital and physical), as

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the outsourcing agreement shall ensure that the service
provider is prohibited from erasing, purging, revoking, altering, or changing any
<image>
data during the transition period, unless specifically advised by the regulator or the
concerned bank.
enriched_requirements.object: provider is prohibited from erasing, purging, revoking, altering, or changing any <image> data during the transition period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A service provider shall be legally obliged to cooperate fully with both the bank and
its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition.
enriched_requirements.object: cooperate fully with both the bank and its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition

conditions: where the service provider deals with the customers of the bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the event of termination of the outsourcing agreement for any reason in cases
where the service provider deals with the customers of the bank, the same shall be
given due publicity by the bank so as to ensure that the customers stop dealing
with the concerned service provider.
enriched_requirements.object: by the bank so as to ensure that the customers stop dealing with the concerned service provider

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may outsource any IT service within its business group / conglomerate,
provided that such an arrangement is backed by the Board-approved policy and
appropriate SLAs / agreements with its group entities are in place.
enriched_requirements.object: backed by the Board-approved policy and appropriate SLAs / agreements with its group entities are in place

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The selection of a group entity shall be based on objective reasons that are similar
to selection of a third-party, and the bank shall appropriately deal with any conflicts
of interest that such an outsourcing arrangement may entail.
enriched_requirements.object: reasons that are similar to selection of a third-party, and the bank shall appropriately deal with any conflicts of interest tha

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank, at all times, shall maintain an arm's length relationship in dealings with its
group entities.
enriched_requirements.object: relationship in dealings with its group entities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Risk management practices being adopted by the bank while
outsourcing to a group entity shall be identical to those specified for a non-related
party.
enriched_requirements.object: specified for a non-related party

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In principle, outsourcing arrangements shall only be entered into with parties
operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality clauses and agreements.
enriched_requirements.object: with parties operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality clauses and agreements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Considering the risks associated with outsourcing of Security Operations Centre
(SOC) operations by a bank, such as data being stored and processed at an
external location and managed by the service provider (or its subcontractors) to
which the bank has lesser visibility, the bank, to mitigate the risks, shall adopt the
following requirements in the case of outsourcing of SOC operations in addition to
the controls prescribed in this Chapter:
definition, customisation and related data / logs, meta-data and analytics
(specific to the bank);
enriched_requirements.object: in the case of outsourcing of SOC operations in addition to the controls prescribed in this Chapter: definition, cust

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Considering the varied services, benefits, and risk profiles associated with the
cloud deployment and service models, a bank that uses cloud services for storage,
computing and movement of data in cloud environments shall, in addition to other
applicable provisions in these Directions,:
enriched_requirements.object: other applicable provisions in these Directions,:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such
assessment shall include, but not be limited to, an analysis of various heads of
cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration,
consulting, migration, and projected recurring expenditure depending on the
nature of workloads.
enriched_requirements.object: limited to, an analysis of various heads of cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration, consulting, m

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The extent of cloud adoption may vary, ranging from
<image>
migration of non-business critical workloads to the cloud, to deployment of
critical business applications such as SaaS, or other combinations in between,
and shall be determined based on a duly conducted business technology risk
assessment;
enriched_requirements.object: a duly conducted business technology risk assessment
procedures are consistent with business needs, and legal and regulatory requirements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For cloud security best practices, a bank may refer to, inter alia, NIST SP 800-
210 General Access Control Guidance for Cloud Systems
https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/SpecialPublications/NIST.SP.800-210.pdf
enriched_requirements.object: NIST SP 800- 210 General Access Control Guidance for Cloud Systems https://nvlpubs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such a policy shall, inter
alia,

A bank shall enter into a contract only with CSPs
that are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements and
the rights available thereunder to the bank, including those relating to
aspects such as data storage, data protection, and confidentiality;
enriched_requirements.object: only with CSPs that are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements and the rights available thereunder to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The technology architecture shall:

enriched_requirements.object: of the service level stipulations in SLA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those Directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those Directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those Directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time being
in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
